name: Agent Skills Search MCP Server (skills.sh)
what_it_does: MCP server for searching and discovering Agent Skills from the skills.sh registry — a catalog of reusable capabilities and skills that AI agents can acquire and use. Enables AI agents to discover what capabilities are available in the skills registry and retrieve skill definitions.
use_cases: Discovering available agent skills and capabilities from the skills.sh registry
Searching for specific skill implementations that agents can use for tasks
Building agent orchestration systems that dynamically discover available capabilities
Enabling AI systems to self-discover what skills are available for novel tasks
not_for: Private organizational skill registries (public skills.sh registry)
Static agent configurations with predefined capabilities
best_when: A dynamic AI agent orchestration system wants to discover what skills and capabilities are available before selecting which to invoke — enabling runtime capability discovery rather than hard-coded skill lists.
avoid_when: You have a fixed set of known capabilities. Dynamic skill discovery adds complexity that isn't needed for simple, well-defined agent workflows.

auth.notes: Public skills registry — likely no auth required for search. Agent skills registry is open for discovery.

pricing.notes: Free open registry for agent skills. MCP server is free open source.

known_agent_gotchas: Skills registry quality depends on community contributions — not all skills are production-ready
Dynamic skill discovery creates unpredictable agent behavior — validate discovered skills
Skill definitions from registry may not match your deployment environment
Emerging ecosystem — registry coverage and quality varies significantly
Security review required for any skills before agents execute them
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Skills from registry may include arbitrary code or capabilities — review before agent execution. Community registry with variable quality control.

security_score_components.security_notes: Community skill registry — variable quality. Security review required before executing discovered skills. Public registry with no content verification.
